title: xeraea sellowiana
intro: Xeraea sellowiana, also known as the 'Aroeira', is a plant native to South America, belonging to the Sapindaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The Aroeira is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties and offer health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Xeraea sellowiana can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and is commonly used in traditional medicine to treat fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
